ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tv_shows" (
  "tv_show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TV show */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the TV show */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the TV show (e.g., comedy, drama) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the TV show */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the TV show (e.g., In Production, Aired, Cancelled) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the TV show */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the TV show */,
  "network" TEXT /* Network on which the TV show is aired */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "seasons" INTEGER /* Number of seasons the TV show has */,
  "episodes_count" INTEGER /* Total number of episodes in all seasons */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the TV show based on all its episodes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the TV show record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the TV show record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tv_show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "tv_show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TV show the episode belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the episode */,
  "writer" TEXT /* Writer of the episode */,
  "original_air_date" TEXT /* Original air date of the episode */,
  "prod_code" TEXT /* Production code of the episode */,
  "viewers" REAL /* Number of viewers for the episode (in millions) */,
  "season_number" INTEGER /* Season number of the episode */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Episode number within the season */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the episode in minutes */,
  "viewers_demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information of the viewers (e.g., age group, gender) */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the episode */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB ID of the episode */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the episode record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the episode record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_tv_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("tv_show_id") REFERENCES tv_shows ("tv_show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating score (out of 10) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review of the episode */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the episode */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., producer, writer, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
